{"subject": "Quick thought on HubSpot's Spring 2026 Spotlight launch with new AE", "body": "Hi Yamini,

Saw that HubSpot Spring 2026 Spotlight launch with new AEO and Smart Deal products targeting go-to-market teams; Q4 2025 financial results pending. Congrats - that kind of momentum is exactly when GTM infrastructure becomes the bottleneck.

GTM Prospect Agent researching companies with strong product innovation signals in the agentic AI and revenue intelligence space

I built something that might be relevant - an AI-native layer that sits on top of your data and helps your reps spend time on the right accounts at the right moment, with context they'd otherwise miss.

Worth a 20-min call to see if there's a fit?

Best,
Abhishek
"}
